title: Opening for Software Engineer at Nature's Basket

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Nature's Basket
jsonLd.description:
Join the Nature's Basket family as a Software Engineer in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Nature's Basket:
Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket!
